ogTitle: West Busselton vs West Casuarinas: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Busselton and West Casuarinas.
heading: West Busselton vs West Casuarinas — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Busselton, Western Australia and West Casuarinas, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Casuarinas has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to West Busselton (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Busselton or West Casuarinas safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Busselton has a flood risk score of 37/100, while West Casuarinas scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Busselton scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. West Casuarinas scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Busselton or West Casuarinas?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Casuarinas has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
